query: Review this PostgreSQL RLS policy and SECURITY DEFINER function.

Review this migration that uses CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY.
Check our JSONB constraints and GIN operator choices.

Optimize this PostgreSQL query from EXPLAIN ANALYZE.

Explain what JSONB is.
